fields.name: targetId
fields.description: Unique identifier for the item being moderated.

fields.name: targetType
fields.description: Specifies the kind of item being moderated.
fields.synonyms: item type, content type, object type

fields.name: reason
fields.description: The justification for flagging the content.

fields.name: flagCount
fields.description: The number of times this item has been flagged.

fields.name: status
fields.description: Current state of the moderation item.

fields.name: reviewedBy
fields.description: The user who performed the review action.

fields.name: reviewedAt
fields.description: Timestamp indicating when the item was last reviewed.
fields.synonyms: review date, review time, last reviewed

fields.name: notes
fields.description: Free-text comments or observations related to the item.

events.name: APPROVE
events.description: Signals that a moderation item has been approved.

events.name: REJECT
events.description: Signals that a moderation item has been rejected.

events.name: ESCALATE
events.description: Signals a flagged item requires further review.

events.name: ModQueueItemLoaded
events.description: A new moderation item is ready for review.

events.name: ModQueueItemLoadFailed
events.description: Indicates failure to load moderation queue items.

events.name: ModQueueItemReviewed
events.description: Signals a moderation queue item has been reviewed and a verdict recorded.

events.name: ModQueueItemReviewFailed
events.description: Indicates a failure to load or process a moderation queue item.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Auto-escalate at
overridableConfigKeys.description: Flag count after which an item is auto-escalated to senior review

overridableConfigKeys.label: Enabled
overridableConfigKeys.description: Whether the moderation queue is active for the host orbital. Off by default; turn on to surface flagged content for review.
overridableConfigKeys.synonyms: enable, turn on, enforce, require, activate, apply, switch on, moderation, moderation queue, content review queue, flag for review, content moderation, review flagged content, abuse review, spam queue, report queue

overridableConfigKeys.label: Table look
overridableConfigKeys.description: Layer 2 visual treatment for the data table rendered by this atom.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Section title
overridableConfigKeys.description: Heading shown above the moderation queue
